_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: We then probed against the activation-associated AKT S473 phosphorylation sites and saw a modest increase in PI3K-AKT pathway signaling
details: Successfully detected modest increase in PI3K-AKT pathway signaling via S473 phosphorylation in NF1-deficient cells
